hub.title: My Employees
hub.subtitle: Manage your AI workforce
hub.empty: No employees yet. Hire your first AI employee from the Marketplace.

secrets.title: Tool Configuration
secrets.description: Configure API keys and secrets for {{name}}'s tools

welcome.subtitle: Let's get your employee ready
welcome.heading: What this employee does
welcome.needLogin: Log in to your account in a browser window
welcome.privacy: Your credentials are never stored. Only session cookies are saved locally.

camofox.subtitle: Browser engine
camofox.heading: Set up Camofox
camofox.description: Camofox is an anti-detection browser that performs actions on your behalf. It needs to be running locally.
camofox.ready: Camofox is connected and ready. You can proceed to the next step.
camofox.skipNote: You can skip this step and set up Camofox later. The employee won't be able to execute tasks until Camofox is running.

login.subtitle: Account login
login.heading: Sign in to your account
login.description: A browser window will open. Log in normally — we'll capture the session cookies automatically.
login.waiting: Waiting for you to log in...
login.waitingDesc: Complete the login in the browser window. We'll detect it automatically.
login.successDesc: Session cookies captured. Your credentials are safe — only cookies are stored.
login.noOAuth: Google/Apple sign-in is not supported in this window. Please use your username and password to log in directly.

complete.subtitle: Ready to work
complete.heading: All set!
complete.description: Your employee is configured and ready to start working.
